title.en: Therefore, Ye Tian will not be high-profile.

content.en:
Soon after, Ye Tian's reputation spread to all the supreme forces, but it was not enough to make all the supreme forces fearful.

After all, even the Yonghao Realm God, as well as the Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace, are only medium among the supreme forces, and there are also peak realm gods who can easily kill the Yonghao Realm God.

No one knows how many powerful peak realm gods are hidden among those supreme forces.

Therefore, Ye Tian will not be high-profile.

For him, as long as those supreme forces do not provoke him, he will not provoke these supreme forces.

......

In the blink of an eye, the five trillion solstice era years have passed.

During this period of time, the Eternal Realm and the Demon Seed Abyss were very calm, and those supreme forces were also very low-key, and nothing big happened.

But there have been many changes in the human race, and a large number of high-level realm gods have been born, and even high-level peak realm gods have been born one after another~.

Ye Tian's wife and children have all raised their cultivation to the high-level peak realm god realm, although the speed of cultivation is not as fast as Ye Tian's, but they have also raised the eternal Dao species to the limit of high-level peak realm gods.

In addition, some ordinary high-level realm gods of the human race, with the help of super-dimensional resources, can improve their cultivation faster, but their combat effectiveness is not very good, but as long as they are given some super-dimensional resources, it is not difficult to become a peak realm god.

this day.

Ye Tian's wife, Xiao Yue, was preparing to attack the peak realm of the gods, and Ye Tian had already prepared super-dimensional resources for her to assist in breakthroughs, and the success rate of her breakthrough was no less than seven or eighty percent.

"Yue'er, you go and break through!"

Ye Tian was in the depths of the Terran Temple, Dao.

"Husband, I'm going to break through!"

Xiao Yue went to retreat to impact the peak realm of gods.

After a period of time, Xiao Yue's retreat emitted the aura of the tenth eternal realm spirit.

"Yue'er has broken through!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

After a period of time, Xiao Yue successfully stepped into the peak realm of gods and walked out of the retreat void.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian's daughter Ye Xingyue also broke through to the peak realm god, and her son Ye Xingchen also completed the breakthrough.

At this point, there are already four peak realm gods of the human race.

Moreover, there are more than a dozen high-level peak realm gods of the human race, although they are all ordinary high-level peak realm gods, but they are also normal combat power.

"Now, the Terrans are qualified to be among the supreme forces!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Therefore, he directly applied to the Boundary Court Headquarters to promote the Terran to the supreme power.

This requires the approval of other supreme forces.

So, on this day, one of the pinnacle realm gods of the Two Realms Gate - the multi-dimensional realm gods.

Ye Tian and the Multidimensional Realm God are also familiar.

Terran.

The Multidimensional Realm God came and said, "Congratulations to the Ye Heavenly Realm God!"

"Multidimensional Realm God, what procedure should the human race go through if it wants to become a supreme force?"

Ye Tian asked.

The multidimensional realm god smiled and said: "Actually, it's just a process, we all know that the strength of the human race is enough to qualify as a supreme force, just take a look at it this time, and when the time comes, directly announce that the human race has become a supreme force." However, once the Terrans become a supreme force, they need to relocate their territory to the Boundary Rift Realm, and transform the Boundary Rift Boundary into the headquarters of the Terrans. It's not very suitable for competing for resources with other top forces and powerful forces, and that's not suitable either. "

Ye Tian frowned slightly, but his expression soon relaxed, for the human race, there is nothing to care about in the Eternal Realm or the Realm God Realm now.

First of all, a boundary rift can continuously breed resources, enough to supply the human race.

It's just that there are too many human races, and the other supreme forces don't have so many people, so a boundary rift realm is enough.

However, if the Terrans only occupy a boundary rift, they can barely do it.

"The Terrans can relocate to the Endless Seam Realm, but if the Terrans are willing to integrate into some of the territories of other forces, there should be no problem!"

Ye Tian said.

"No problem. The Multidimensional Realm God smiled and said: "Those ordinary human races are not members of the Supreme Force, and if they do not reach the realm of the Realm God Realm, they are not members of the Supreme Force, and naturally they will not have much impact." However, there are still too many Terrans, and most of them still have to migrate. "

"No problem!" Ye Tian nodded, "However, my human race has migrated to the realm of the Endless Rift and become a supreme force, I don't know if there is some benefit?"

The multi-dimensional realm god said: "There are naturally benefits, first of all, you can get a way to go straight into the Death Void, that is, to enter the Death Void directly from the realm of the boundary crack, and this method is also studied by many supreme forces, and there is no need to find any cracks." "

"Oh, there's still such a way?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He also thought that those supreme forces came out of those cracks, and it seemed that the cracks were just one of the channels for the supreme forces to get out, and they were for those top forces to see.

For example, the crack passage of Taihao Tianchao Palace allows the high-level realm gods of the top forces to enter and exit, but in fact, the peak realm gods of Taihao Tianchao Palace do not go there.

"Other than that, is there any benefit?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Yes!" said the Multidimensional Realm God again, "Once the Terrans become a supreme force, they can meddle in the headquarters of the Realm Court at will, and they can also participate in the extradimensional meetings of the supreme forces, as well as share and gain more extradimensional knowledge. Of course, if you want to obtain extradimensional knowledge, you must pay a price, or exchange extradimensional knowledge for extradimensional knowledge. And the most important point, once you become a supreme force, you can send a middle-level peak realm god into the realm of the five realms to seek resources there. "

The realm of the five seams!

Ye Tian was happy in his heart, although the Terran currently occupies the Endless Gap Realm, this is only one Boundary Crack Realm, if he can also intervene in the five Boundary Crack Realms, with the strength of the Human Race, he will definitely be able to obtain a large amount of resources from these Boundary Crack Realms.

Although it is useless to him, it is useful to those gods of the human race!

Ye Tian chatted with the Multidimensional Realm God for a long time before the Multidimensional Realm God left.

Soon, news spread that the Terrans had become a supreme force.

As a result, the Terrans began to intervene in the realm of the five seams, and the migration was also underway.

......

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian turned into a giant hand with the power of the extradimensional dimension, directly covering an eternal realm, directly moving this eternal kingdom and bringing it into the realm of the endless rift.

Next, Ye Tian moved all the eternal realms of the human race to the realm of the Endless Realm, and the process was extremely easy, this was the strength and means of the peak realm god.

It didn't take long for the eternal kingdom of the human race to be relocated by him into the boundary of the Endless Seam.
